title: Add support for microsoft bicep module definitions.

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

That seems correct, at a first glance: the `docker-archive` format can represent _images_ (notably all blobs must be in the usual overlay tar format, and decompressed); and an artifact is not an image.

If you need to transfer the artifact as files, `oci:`/`oci-archive:`/`dir:` should work.
I see. Thanks for the info, this indeed solved the problem.
